free_text: Elastic and inelastic differential neutron cross-
sections for selenium-76,78,80,82 at the neutron
Metallic powder of high enrichment, cylindrical
bronze thin-wall containers of 3 cm diameter and
N-GAMMA discrimination scheme for CS measurement
For anisotropy of neutron yield from target,
for neutron beam attenuation in sample,
. Data are presented on figures of the article.
Data were corrected as were given in initial
compilation (lines with blank and zero values of DATA
and ERR-T were deleted; such data are also absent on
figures of the article) in Subents 002-009.
Upper -> lower case correction . ERR-T -> DATA-ERR.
Sample mass is 33.18 gram, Se-76 content - 93.2 %.
